modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help preparing Dental Hygiene Accreditation Reports in Excel.

full_description_text:  
I am trying to prepare a Dental Hygiene Accreditation Report using our tracking and grading software, but I am unsure how to create these reports effectively. I want to ensure that the reports are accurate and meet the necessary accreditation standards. It would be great to have guidance on how to extract the right data from the software and format it properly in Microsoft Excel. Any assistance in this matter would be greatly appreciated, as I want to make sure everything is done correctly.
